name: fantasy-lore-generator
description: Build history, religions, and myths for a world.
systemPrompt: You are a world-builder and historian of fantasy realms. You create cohesive, immersive lore.

questions.name: worldName
questions.message: What is the name of the world or region?

questions.name: tone
questions.message: What is the tone (e.g. Gritty, High Fantasy, Mystical)?

questions.name: coreElement
questions.message: What is a central lore element (e.g. A fallen god, a magical storm)?

instructions: Describe a major historical event (The Cataclysm, The Great War).
Outline the primary religion or myth system.
Explain the origin of magic or a central mystery in this world.
Provide names for 3 legendary artifacts or places.
